original_hypothesis.title: Tax Rate Underflow Enables Infinite Token Minting
original_hypothesis.hypothesis_description: If an admin sets the tax rate above 100% (10000 BP), the unchecked math in `_taxProcessing` will underflow, minting near-infinite tokens to the recipient (the liquidity pool) and destroying the token's economy.
original_hypothesis.investigation_rationale: `setProjectTaxRates` lacks upper bound validation. If `projectSellTaxBasisPoints > 10000`, the calculated `tax` exceeds `sentAmount_`. Inside the `unchecked` block, `amountLessTax_ -= tax` underflows to a value near `uint256.max`. This massive amount is then added to the recipient's balance in `_transfer`.

proof_of_signal.pattern: amountLessTax_ -= tax inside unchecked block with no prior bounds check on tax

preconditions: Admin or Factory sets tax rate > 10000
A user executes a taxable transfer (e.g., sells to the pool)

initial_economic_evidence.suspicious_calculation: amountLessTax_ = sentAmount_ - tax (underflows if tax > sentAmount_)
initial_economic_evidence.manipulation_vector: Admin sets malicious tax rate, triggering underflow on next trade
initial_economic_evidence.profit_hypothesis: The liquidity pool receives infinite tokens, crashing the price to zero and allowing the attacker to drain all paired assets (e.g., WETH) by syncing the pool.

economic_questions: Can a compromised admin key execute this instantly?
Is there a timelock on the factory's admin role?
validation_requirements: Verify if the factory enforces tax limits before calling setProjectTaxRates.

preliminary_attack_economics.potential_profit_range: All paired assets in the Uniswap pool

market_conditions_analysis.market_impact_assessment: Complete destruction of the agent token economy

potential_victim_impact.direct_victims: All token holders and LP providers

investigation_priorities.parameter_analysis: Check admin access controls and timelocks
investigation_priorities.calculation_validation: Confirm underflow behavior in Solidity 0.8.x inside unchecked

validation_result.impact_summary: Filtered before validation: attack_realism is LOW
validation_result.detailed_analysis: This hypothesis was auto-rejected because its attack_realism grade is LOW. Preconditions require actions outside the attacker's control (off-chain compromise, victim cooperation, or admin collusion). No LLM validation was performed.
